_doc: Synthetic fixture set for the Excel Read Range sheet-not-found (dynamic SheetName resolved empty) scenario; mock dispatcher only - do not treat as investigation evidence. docsai proxied to the real CLI; job/folder lookups return a canned Faulted-job fixture. Matching is token-aware (first match wins); patterns are quote-agnostic.

unmocked_default._doc: Permissive fallback: any uip command not matched returns an empty array so the agent can explore without aborting.
